headline: Palo Alto CEO's $10 Million Buy May Signal A Bottom In Cybersecurity Stocks
summary: After one of the sharpest non-recession drawdowns in decades, cybersecurity stocks may finally be getting something they've lacked for months: insider conviction. According to JPMorgan analyst Brian Essex, the clearest signal came from Nikesh Arora. The Palo Alto Networks, Inc. CEO stepped into the open market with a ~$10 million stock purchase — a move that stands out in a sector dominated by selling.
